Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0900 "CRACKUP-5000-0900" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Crack-Up.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $5000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
